roa.docketEntryComment: PET & ORDER TO SUSP FEE PER SFBOS 180132 SIGNED AND FILED
PUB DEF MOT TO QUASH SEARCH WARR SIGNED OFF BY JUDGE DEKREON

/TWS/CH2:CJ 6M/CTS:66/4019HALF/VF2:150/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/PF525 12/LVAL/LCHEM/COA:40/ICNA/EMAT/1463ALC/COLLECT/CCC:14028850, 2470019, AND 2462741//OBEY/ACCEP/X:PLEA FORM NUMBER PRU 101 IS INCORPORATED BY REFERENCE AS THOUGH FULLY SET FORTH HEREIN/X:23593(A) VC ADMONITION GIVEN,/DISM3/4019HALF

/CAL:MOTION TO QUASH SEARCH WARRANT/X:ADA FILES OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO QUASH SEARCH WARRANT,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OFNL/DEF:ADMITS PRIORS FROM SOLANO AND ALAMEDA COUNTIES/DEFT ADV NL:2/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:ADA FILES FIRST AMENDED MISDEMEANOR COMPLAINT,/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:COURT SETS BAIL WITHOUT PREJUDICE:/BAIL:50,000/CTORD:SHOULD DEFENDANT BAIL OUT OF CUSTODY, HEIS TO COMPLY WITH THE SHERIFF'S SCRAM PROGRAM/NTW/LDTR:12-04-14/CONTD:TOBE HEARD WITH FELONY CASES (2462741 AND 2470019) AND FOR JURY TRIAL/DOP/
/CAL: TBH WITH 2462741 & 2470019/LD:12-04-14/X: JURY TRIAL DATE OF 11-21-14 IS CONFIRMED/
